scenario.key_phrase: My friend told me to call, I'm not sure I'm ready

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, mera naam Priya hai PhysicsWallah se. Maine suna hai aapne humse contact kiya tha regarding our courses. May I know your good name?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi... umm, main Rahul hun. Actually my friend told me to call, I'm not sure I'm ready or anything.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan Rahul, bilkul no problem! It's good that your friend recommended us. Sirf casual conversation kar lete hain. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! 11th mein ho toh perfect timing hai. Are you planning for any competitive exam like JEE or NEET? Ya sirf boards ke liye prepare kar rahe ho?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: NEET... but I haven't really started serious preparation yet. I mean, I'm just thinking about it.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's completely fine Rahul! NEET 2027 ke liye you still have good time - around 20 months. Early start karna is always better. Have you looked into any coaching options before, or would this be your first time?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, haven't joined anywhere yet. But honestly, I'm worried about the fees and all. My parents haven't really discussed budget with me.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I completely understand your concern, Rahul. Good news yeh hai ki we offer very affordable options. Our NEET Yakeen 2027 batch is ₹33999, but we have 0% EMI at just ₹3299 per month through PW Pay - that's less than what most families spend daily on chai! Would you like to know what's included?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Umm... maybe. But I can't decide anything right now. I need to talk to my parents first about all this.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul theek hai Rahul! Family se discuss karna is very important for such decisions. Main aapko ek quick overview de deta hun, then you can share with your parents. Deal?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay... but just briefly. I have to go for tuition also.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, sirf 2 minutes! NEET Yakeen mein you get complete syllabus coverage, daily practice questions, mock tests, and doubt clearing sessions. Plus Alakh Sir's recorded lectures bhi milte hain. Should I call you back when you're free to discuss with parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yeah... that would be better. Can you call tomorrow evening? Around 6 PM maybe? I'll talk to my mom and dad by then.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect Rahul! Main kal 6 PM call karunga. Meanwhile, I'll send you a WhatsApp message with course details jo aap parents ko dikha sakte ho. All the best for your tuition today!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, thanks Priya. Will check the message and discuss at home. See you... I mean, talk to you tomorrow.
